final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, matrikkelnummertekst, representasjonspunkt, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) as srid
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get parcels (teig) for the municipality; will filter by kommunenummer from step 1

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) to be clipped to municipality extent

4.description: clip storm-surge polygons to the municipality extent to reduce the national layer

5.description: find parcels that intersect the clipped storm-surge polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per parcel (teigid)
